creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
More details ⤵️

Dubai Creek Harbour is one of our fave sunset spots in Dubai. In fact, we consider it as the perfect one on good weather conditions! Here, you can see the amazing Dubai skyline drenched in golden sun rays on a nice sunny day. Sandstorms can dampen it a bit, so make sure to plan your visit when skies are clear. 🤗 

🚊 To get there by public transportation, ride the Green Line train to Creek station. Take a short walk to Al Jaddaf Marine Station.
🚤 RTA boat timings as of September 2024. Please check website for current schedule:
Al Jaddaf Marine Station - Dubai Creek Harbour 
Summer timings: Monday to Friday: 7:30 AM to 10:50 AM, 4:00 PM to 10:50 PM
* Edit: Timings change every season. As of October, this route is now available daily. Please check RTA website for more information.
One way fare: AED 2. You can use your NOL card.

Save this reel for your next Dubai trip!
